The Collections

Bouquets & Boutonnieres

Everlasting florals, handcrafted to your palette — a bouquet built to be treasured long after the last dance, and boutonnieres to match.

Everlasting · by custom quote
Yours to Keep
Everlasting Florals

A Bouquet That Never Needs Water

Fresh florals last a day; these are built for the decades after it. Each bouquet is handcrafted bloom by bloom to your wedding palette — carried down the aisle, photographed all evening, and then kept, not composted.

  • Handcrafted blooms composed to your colors and floral vision
  • Groom and groomsmen boutonnieres hand-finished to match the party palette
  • No wilting, no cold storage, no morning-of flower delivery logistics
  • Priced by composition — share your vision and we'll quote it piece by piece
Request a Custom Quote Also available on Etsy
Made after you order · lead time quoted with your design
Made to Order
Ready in ~2 Weeks
Free Color Matching
Ships Worldwide
★★★★★ 4.9/5 from 246 reviews — read our love notes →

No obligation — share your vision and we'll reply with a personalized quote, usually within 1–2 days.

In the Wild

Florals on Wedding Days

Good to Know

Common Questions

Why everlasting flowers instead of fresh?

Handcrafted blooms don't wilt, need no cold storage or morning-of delivery, and are kept long after the wedding — built for the decades after the day, not just the day.

How is a bouquet priced?

By composition — share your vision and we'll quote it piece by piece, with the lead time confirmed alongside your design. More questions →
